description: A hotel guest wants to book a 60-minute deep tissue massage at the hotel spa.

nodes.task_description: Check the spa's availability for a 60-minute deep tissue massage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an open appointment slot for the desired time.

nodes.task_description: Book the appointment under the guest's name and room number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the spa appointment.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the appointment details with the guest and inform them the charge will be posted to their room folio.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear confirmation of the booking.
